features: PACK OF 6: Indulge in luxury with delicate body wash in a pack of 6, vegan-friendly and reusable
LUXURY TOILETRIES- Treat yourself to the royale garden peach peony jasmine experience at home
REUSABLE: Refillable bottles for sustainable luxury that is kind to your skin and the environment
FRAGRANCE: Enjoy the subtle blend of peach, peony & jasmine for a pampering shower experience at home
VEGAN FRIENDLY: Cruelty-free formula suitable for all skin types, making it suitable for everyone in your household
description: Product Description Encompassing a delicately balanced floral blend of peony and peach, perfectly combined with jasmine to leave your skin and body uplifted, relaxed and beautifully cleansed. Take a stroll through an English garden with out assortment of country classics. Timeless toiletries combine with stunning illustrations and sensational scents that celebrate the best of the natural world. Florals, fruits and feminine motifs provide the perfect products for house-proud self purchase or effortless gifting. Ingredients Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Peg-4 Rapeseedamide, Sodium Benzoate, Glycerin, Parfum (Fragrance), Glycol Distearate, Laureth-4, Citric Acid, Tetrasodium Edta, Sodium Hydroxide, Linalool, Benzyl Salicylate, Limonene. Directions Lather and Rinse Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR See more
